titleStmt.title: SII 16.33: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 33. (A.R. No. 269 of 1905.) TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up to the north of the Chīkaṭimidde in the Tripurāntakēśvara temple near the village.

The record in Sanskrit verse is dated in Śaka 1363 expressed by the chronogram guṇatarka-rāma-śaśi, Kārtika, parva, Monday. This may correspond to 1441 A.D., October 30, Monday which was a day of Paurṇamī ·06 or November 13, Monday which was a day of Amāvāsyā °86.

It records the construction of a tank and grant of some land in Maindanapāḍu for a flower garden, three cows for supply of ghee for the lamps and brass vessels for offerings to god Tripurāntaka called Bālaśailaśirōmaṇi and Taruṇagirinātha, by Mallaṇārya or Mallaya-mantrin, son of Timmaya-mantrin who was the son of Narahari of Udayagiri in Karṇāṭa. The gifts are said to have been made at the instance of the pontiff Bhikshāvṛitti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśailaśikhararatnaṁ śrīmān tri
purāṁttakō vatādyuṣmān [.]
yatkī¨rttikalpavallī phalati catu¨rvva
[¨rgga]phalamajādīnāṁ [.1.*] Asti praśastaḥ
pṛthivītalēṁdraḥ śrīdēvarāyō vi
jayātmajanmā . tasminmahīṁ śāsa
ti puṇyakī¨rttau divammarutvāniva
divyalakṣmīṁ [.2.*] Udayagirināmni naga
rē kāṁttē ka¨rṇnāṭakaṭakamadhyasthē . bhā
radvājasagōtrō naraharināmā
dvijōsti dha¨rmmātmā [.3.*] tadātmajastimma
yamaṁtrisaṁjñastatsūnu rāsīt
bhuvi mallaṇā¨ryyaḥ . sadā śivābhya
¨rccanaśīlayuktō dvijēṁdrapūjā
niratō manīṣī [.4.*] sōbhyētya śaivasā
mrājyaka¨rttārammuktisādhanaṁ . bhikṣā
vṛttiyatiśrēṣṭhaṁ prā¨rtthayitvā ta
dājñayā [.5.*] tripurāṁttakadēvasya bā
laśailaśirōmaṇēḥ . nityaṁ pūjāṁ
ca naivēdyaṁ ka¨rttu mudyuktamānasaḥ [.6.*]
maiṁdanapāṭigrāmē tripurāṁttaka
dēvasīmni pūrvvasmin . badhvā dṛḍhaṁ ta
ṭākaṁ labdhvā kṣētraṁ ca tatra tatkṣē
traṁ [.7.*] śākābdē guṇata¨rkkarāma
śaśibhi¨ryyuktē tadā du¨rmmatau va
¨rṣē kā¨rttikaparvaṇīṁdudivasē
śrīmallaṇā¨ryyō vibhuḥ . prādā
nmaiṁdanapāṭināmani purē kṣē
traṁ purārātayē puṣpārāma
majasra mapyanudina nnityā¨rccanā
siddhayē [.8.*] gōtrayaṁ sukhasaṁdō
haṁ nityadīpaghṛtāya ca . vima
laṁ kāṁsyapātraṁ ca nai vēdyāya
dadau prabhuḥ [.9.*] mallayamaṁttri
sama¨rppita manudina māsvādya
taruṇagirināthaḥ . naivēdyamiṁ
dumauḷi stasmai dadyādabhīṣṭa
phalasiddhiṁ . [.10.*] maṁgaḷamahā
śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
